chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4707 of 2023 Bilal Saulat Versus Muhammad Tariq & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.21678/23 3. For orders on Misc. No.21679/23 4. For orders on Misc. No.21680/23 5. For hearing of main case. Dated: 14.11.2023 None present. -.-.- Since last two dates no one is appearing for the petitioner. On the first date of hearing i.e. on 02.10.2023 petitioner and his counsel were called absent followed by their absence on 06.10.2023 and so also today. There is no intimation either. Petition as such is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
